did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The study utilized ex vivo confocal laser microscopy (EVCM) with fluorescent dyes (FCF Fast Green and acridine orange) for imaging and histopathological correlation. The results were obtained through visual grading by clinicians and comparison with standard histology, without the use of AI, machine learning, or computer vision algorithms for analysis or diagnosis.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
